heading: BROWN V. BOARD OF EDUCATION NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
label: LIX–GGG BROWN V. BOARD OF EDUCATION NATIONAL HISTORICAL PARK
notes: Codification, which enacted this subchapter, originally established the Brown v. Board of Education National Historic Site, which is listed in a table of National Historic Sites under , National Park Service and Related Programs. The amendments made by effectively redesignated the site as the Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park, after which the text of , was set out as this subchapter.Pub.
